title: Petroleum Management System
description: This is a Java-based web application that helps manage petroleum sales, fuel types, and stations. It is built using Servlets, JSP, JDBC, and PostgreSQL.

title: BLISS NGO
description:
Developed a dynamic online platform for Bliss NGO to promote mental health awareness.
The site features a user-friendly interface with resources, counseling services, and
community forums, creating a safe, inclusive space for support and connection.

title: Morse_code
description:
I created morse code application using C++ language. But this would've been successful only
if it is Physicaly Possible to make it more scalable and practical i used Arduino Uno which is
part of IoT(Internet of things)

title: Brick_Breaker
description:
This is a simple 2D brick breaker game developed in Java using AWT (Abstract Window
Toolkit) and Swing for the graphical user interface.The game features a paddle controlled by
the player,a bouncing ball, and multiple bricks arranged in a grid.The player’s goal is to
break all the bricks by bouncing the ball off the paddle without letting it fall.

title: Choclate
description: This is Chocolate website which defines the front-end using Photoshop. all the banner is made with Photoshop and then combined with HTML, CSS, JavaScript to make it work and demonstrate the good UI design

title: E-Commerce
description: This is an shopping website for Footwear, this was first website that build when i was trying to find a way in web development ,back then i  learned the basic of HTML , CSS and tried to implement init
